disabled_reasons.ssma: SQL Server to SQL Server migration — DMA is more appropriate
disabled_reasons.azure_storage_mover: Media library <100GB — AzCopy is simpler and sufficient
disabled_reasons.azure_bicep: Mutual exclusion: Terraform/OpenTofu selected as IaC tool
disabled_reasons.azure_load_testing: K6 selected as primary load testing tool
disabled_reasons.azure_policy: No confirmed compliance requirements — enable if PCI/HIPAA/GDPR discovered
disabled_reasons.github_actions_copilot: Mutual exclusion: Azure DevOps Pipelines selected (repos already on Azure DevOps)
disabled_reasons.azure_site_recovery: IaaS replatform approach — not using ASR lift-and-shift pathway
disabled_reasons.azure_traffic_manager: Standard DNS cutover planned — gradual cutover not required
